subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-12 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: I prithee and do seek relief for all creation, yet the people themselves become the cause of their own constraint. It is as though [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من دعا می کنم و برای خلق گشایش می طلبم اما خلق خودشان سبب تنگی می شوند.  مثل اینست که
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
